package rulecoverage

func PositiveExternalHttpCallInsideTransactionScope() string {
    ruleID := "external_http_call_inside_transaction_scope"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Network calls performed while a DB transaction is open."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
